entityStruct.description: DD2 Entity/Character structure (approx 40 bytes per entity)

0.name: state
0.desc: Entity state machine index (lower nibble used as dispatch)

34.name: ground_y
34.desc: Ground Y level for this entity

hardwareMap.$1000-$17FF: Sprite attribute RAM (256 sprites × 4 bytes: y, tile, attr, x)
